response.step_by_step_log: I analyzed the video and identified the song as a cover of the Indonesian classic 'Sabda Alam'. I searched for the lyrics using the query 'Sabda Alam Indonesian and English lyrics' and successfully located them. The song is performed by virtual talents Kobo Kanaeru, Kaela Kovalskia, and Pavolia Reine.
response.global_summary: A musical performance featuring VTubers Kobo Kanaeru, Kaela Kovalskia, and Pavolia Reine performing the song 'Sabda Alam', followed by a self-introduction segment.

scenes.description: VTubers Kobo Kanaeru, Kaela Kovalskia, and Pavolia Reine perform a cover of the Indonesian song 'Sabda Alam' on a stage.
scenes.performer_in_video: Kobo Kanaeru, Kaela Kovalskia, and Pavolia Reine
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Sabda Alam
Diciptakan alam pria dan wanita
Dua makhluk jaya asuhan dewata
Ditakdirkan bahwa pria berkuasa
Adapun wanita lemah lembut manja
Wanita dijajah pria sejak dulu
Jadikan perhiasan sangkar madu
Namun adakala pria tak berdaya
Tekuk lutut disudut kerling wanita
Sabda alam, menghanyutkan suasanaku
Sabda alam, berbuah kodrat tak tertahan
Sabda alam, menghanyutkan suasanaku
Sabda alam, berbuah kodrat tak tertahan
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Nature's Law (Sabda Alam)
The world was created, man and woman
Two glorious beings, fostered by the gods
It is ordained that men shall be powerful
While women are soft, gentle, and spoiled
Women have been conquered by men since long ago
Made into ornaments, honey in a cage
But there are times when men are helpless
Kneeling at the corner of a woman's glance
Nature's law, flowing through my atmosphere
Nature's law, bearing an irresistible destiny
Nature's law, flowing through my atmosphere
Nature's law, bearing an irresistible destiny
